zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes Ier de Blois於大約0950年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Tours38歲，母親Luitgarde de Vermandois31歲。他於大約0979年與Berthe de Bourgogne在法國布格結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於977年在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易圖爾斯被列為count of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omois。他去世於0995年3月12日享年46歲，埋葬在法國崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes Ier de Blois于大约0950年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，他的父亲Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Tours38岁，母亲Luitgarde de Vermandois31岁。他于大约0979年与Berthe de Bourgogne在法国布格结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于977年在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易圖爾斯被列为count of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omois。他去世于0995年3月12日享年46岁，埋葬在法国崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Eade , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Edes
meanings: This name is found as a variant or pet form of Edith in Yorkshire from the 15th century onwards. It is recorded as a baptismal name in the 16th century. In present-day use it probably refers to the biblical ‘Garden of Eden’, crew ῾eden ‘place of pleasure’. As a boy's name it may also represent a variant of Aidan or a transferred use of a surname, itself derived in the Middle Ages from a given name Edun or Edon. This is of Old English origin, from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + hūn ‘bear cub’.

variants.name: Edds
meanings: Pet form of any of several old German names beginning with Ed-. The Elder and Younger Eddas are also the names of two influential Old Icelandic books of Norse myths and poems.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes Ier de Blois was born about 0950, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, his father, Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Tours, was 38 and his mother, Luitgarde de Vermandois, was 31. He married Berthe de Bourgogne about 0979, in Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. In 977, at the age of 28, his occupation is listed as count of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omois in Tours, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. He died on 12 March 0995, at the age of 46, and was buried in Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes Ier de Blois est né environ 0950, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Tours, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Luitgarde de Vermandois, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Berthe de Bourgogne environ 0979, à Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. En 977, à l’âge de 28 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est count of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omois à Tours, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Il est décédé le 12 mars 0995, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes Ier de Blois um 0950 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Tours 38 und seine Mutter Luitgarde de Vermandois 31. Er hat um 0979 in Burgund, Frankreich Berthe de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 977, als er 28 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als count of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omois in Tours, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. März 0995 im Alter von 46 Jahren und wurde in Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes Ier de Blois è nato il circa 0950 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Tours, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Luitgarde de Vermandois, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Berthe de Bourgogne circa 0979, nel Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 977, all'età di 28 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come count of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omois nel Tours, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Morì il 12 marzo 0995, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eudes Ier de Bloisが約0950年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Toursは38歳，母Luitgarde de Vermandoisは31歳であった。約0979年にフランスボウルゴグンでBerthe de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。977年，28歳の時，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアートウルズでの職業はcount of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omoisと記録されている。彼は0995年3月12日に46歳で死去し，フランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアートウルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eudes Ier de Blois(이)가 대략 0950년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Tours(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Luitgarde de Vermandois(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 0979년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 Berthe de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 977년, 28세의 나이로 그의 직업은 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 토우르스에서 count of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omois이었다. 그는 0995년 3월 12일 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 토우르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes Ier de Blois nasceu aproximadamente 0950, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Tours, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Luitgarde de Vermandois, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Berthe de Bourgogne aproximadamente 0979, em Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 977, com 28 anos, sua profissão aparece como count of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omois em Tours, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 0995, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes Ier de Blois родился около 0950 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Tours было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Luitgarde de Vermandois, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Berthe de Bourgogne около 0979 г. в местности бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 977 году, в возрасте 28 лет,  он работал по профессии count of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omois в местности тоурс, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. Он умер 12 марта 0995 г. в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности тоурс, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudes Ier de Blois nació aproximadamente 0950, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Thibaud de Blois vicomte de Tours, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Luitgarde de Vermandois, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Berthe de Bourgogne aproximadamente 0979, en Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. En 977, a la edad de 28 años, su ocupación registrada era count of blois, chartres, reims, provins, châteaudun, and omois en Tours, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Murió el 12 de marzo de 0995, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia.
